Container.Name: dify-aio
Container.Overview: Dify AIO packages the Dify self-hosted stack for Unraid in one practical container: API, workers, web UI, plugin daemon, code sandbox, SSRF proxy, Nginx, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and Redis. Leave the defaults in place for a first install, open the Web UI, and create the initial admin account. Secrets are generated on first boot under /appdata/config/generated.env. Advanced users can point Dify at external PostgreSQL, Redis, object storage, vector databases, SMTP, reverse proxy URLs, observability endpoints, and the broader upstream Dify environment surface.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-04-29 - Generated from CHANGELOG.md during release preparation. Do not edit manually. - Scaffold Dify AIO from the current Unraid AIO template. - Bundle Dify API, web, worker, beat, sandbox, plugin daemon, PostgreSQL/pgvector, Redis, Nginx, and SSRF proxy defaults.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: ai agent workflow llm rag chatbot mcp openai anthropic ollama app builder knowledge base
Container.Requires: Dify is a heavier multi-service application. Plan for at least 2 CPU cores and 4 GiB RAM, with more memory for real workloads. Public exposure should be placed behind a trusted reverse proxy with TLS. Model-provider API keys, SMTP, object storage, and external vector stores are optional but may be required for production use.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Dify Web UI and API gateway port.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent Dify data, generated secrets, PostgreSQL data, Redis data, uploads, plugin storage, and sandbox configuration.

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: Optional external base URL such as https://dify.example.com. Used to default Dify console, app, trigger, WebSocket, and file URLs.

Config.Name: Initial Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional initial admin password. Dify limits this value to 30 characters. Leave blank to set the admin account during first-run setup.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Dify application secret key. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot. Changing this after setup invalidates encrypted credentials and sessions.

Config.Name: Use Internal PostgreSQL
Config.Description: Use the bundled PostgreSQL 15 database with pgvector. Set false only when using an external PostgreSQL-compatible database.

Config.Name: Database Type
Config.Description: Database type used by Dify. The bundled AIO database is PostgreSQL.

Config.Name: Database Host
Config.Description: PostgreSQL host. Keep 127.0.0.1 for bundled PostgreSQL.

Config.Name: Database Port
Config.Description: PostgreSQL port.

Config.Name: Database User
Config.Description: PostgreSQL user for Dify.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: PostgreSQL password. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database used by the Dify API.

Config.Name: Plugin Database Name
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database used by the Dify plugin daemon.

Config.Name: Use Internal Redis
Config.Description: Use the bundled Redis instance. Set false only when using an external Redis service.

Config.Name: Redis Host
Config.Description: Redis host. Keep 127.0.0.1 for bundled Redis.

Config.Name: Redis Port
Config.Description: Redis port.

Config.Name: Redis Password
Config.Description: Redis password. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot.

Config.Name: Celery Broker URL
Config.Description: Optional explicit Celery broker URL. Leave blank to derive it from Redis settings.

Config.Name: Console API URL
Config.Description: Optional public console API URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or incoming requests.

Config.Name: Console Web URL
Config.Description: Optional public console web URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or incoming requests.

Config.Name: Service API URL
Config.Description: Optional public Service API URL shown inside Dify. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or incoming requests.

Config.Name: Trigger URL
Config.Description: Optional public trigger URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or use Dify defaults.

Config.Name: App API URL
Config.Description: Optional published-app API URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or incoming requests.

Config.Name: App Web URL
Config.Description: Optional published-app web URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL or incoming requests.

Config.Name: Files URL
Config.Description: Optional public file preview/download URL. Leave blank to derive from Public URL.

Config.Name: Internal Files URL
Config.Description: Internal file URL used by Dify services. Leave blank for the AIO localhost default.

Config.Name: Next Public Socket URL
Config.Description: Optional WebSocket URL for collaboration mode. Leave blank to derive from Public URL when provided.

Config.Name: Log File
Config.Description: Optional Dify log file path. Leave blank for /appdata/logs/server.log.

Config.Name: Log Timezone
Config.Description: Optional Dify log timezone. Leave blank to inherit TZ.

Config.Name: Server Workers
Config.Description: Dify API worker count. Increase only if the host has enough CPU and memory.

Config.Name: Server Worker Class
Config.Description: Gunicorn worker class. The AIO default supports collaboration WebSockets.

Config.Name: Celery Workers
Config.Description: Dify background worker count. Increase for indexing-heavy workloads on larger hosts.

Config.Name: Celery Worker Class
Config.Description: Celery worker class. Keep gevent unless debugging an upstream-specific issue.

Config.Name: Gunicorn Timeout
Config.Description: API request timeout in seconds.

Config.Name: Vector Store
Config.Description: Dify vector database backend. The default uses bundled PostgreSQL with pgvector. Non-pgvector choices require external services and matching variables.

Config.Name: PGVector Host
Config.Description: Optional pgvector host override. Leave blank to reuse the Dify database host.

Config.Name: PGVector Port
Config.Description: Optional pgvector port override. Leave blank to reuse the Dify database port.

Config.Name: PGVector User
Config.Description: Optional pgvector user override. Leave blank to reuse the Dify database user.

Config.Name: PGVector Password
Config.Description: Optional pgvector password override. Leave blank to reuse the Dify database password.

Config.Name: PGVector Database
Config.Description: Optional pgvector database override. Leave blank to reuse the Dify database name.

Config.Name: Qdrant URL
Config.Description: External Qdrant URL when Vector Store is qdrant.

Config.Name: Qdrant API Key
Config.Description: External Qdrant API key when required.

Config.Name: Weaviate Endpoint
Config.Description: External Weaviate HTTP endpoint when Vector Store is weaviate.

Config.Name: Weaviate API Key
Config.Description: External Weaviate API key when required.

Config.Name: Weaviate GRPC Endpoint
Config.Description: External Weaviate gRPC endpoint when required.

Config.Name: Storage Type
Config.Description: Dify file storage backend. The default uses local OpenDAL filesystem storage under AppData.

Config.Name: OpenDAL Scheme
Config.Description: OpenDAL storage scheme. The AIO default uses local filesystem storage.

Config.Name: OpenDAL Filesystem Root
Config.Description: OpenDAL filesystem root. Leave blank for /app/api/storage, symlinked to AppData.

Config.Name: S3 Endpoint
Config.Description: S3-compatible storage endpoint when using S3 storage.

Config.Name: S3 Region
Config.Description: S3 region.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket Name
Config.Description: S3 bucket for Dify files.

Config.Name: S3 Access Key
Config.Description: S3 access key.

Config.Name: S3 Secret Key
Config.Description: S3 secret key.

Config.Name: Enable Sandbox
Config.Description: Run the bundled Dify sandbox used for code execution. Disabling it breaks code-execution features.

Config.Name: Sandbox API Key
Config.Description: Sandbox API key. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot.

Config.Name: Code Execution Endpoint
Config.Description: Dify sandbox endpoint. Leave blank for the AIO localhost sandbox.

Config.Name: Code Execution API Key
Config.Description: Dify sandbox API key used by the API service. Leave blank to mirror Sandbox API Key.

Config.Name: Sandbox Network Access
Config.Description: Allow sandboxed code to access the network through the bundled SSRF proxy.

Config.Name: Sandbox Worker Timeout
Config.Description: Sandbox execution timeout in seconds.

Config.Name: Sandbox Port
Config.Description: Sandbox service port. Leave blank for 8194.

Config.Name: Sandbox HTTP Proxy
Config.Description: HTTP proxy used by sandboxed code. Leave blank for the bundled SSRF proxy.

Config.Name: Sandbox HTTPS Proxy
Config.Description: HTTPS proxy used by sandboxed code. Leave blank for the bundled SSRF proxy.

Config.Name: SSRF HTTP Proxy URL
Config.Description: Internal HTTP proxy URL used by Dify. Leave blank for the bundled SSRF proxy.

Config.Name: SSRF HTTPS Proxy URL
Config.Description: Internal HTTPS proxy URL used by Dify. Leave blank for the bundled SSRF proxy.

Config.Name: SSRF Reverse Proxy Port
Config.Description: Internal reverse proxy port. Leave blank for the AIO non-conflicting default.

Config.Name: SSRF Sandbox Host
Config.Description: Sandbox host name used by the SSRF proxy. Leave blank for localhost.

Config.Name: Plugin Daemon Key
Config.Description: Plugin daemon server key. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot.

Config.Name: Plugin Inner API Key
Config.Description: Shared inner API key used between Dify and the plugin daemon. Leave blank to generate and persist one on first boot.

Config.Name: Plugin Daemon URL
Config.Description: Plugin daemon URL used by Dify. Leave blank for the AIO localhost plugin daemon.

Config.Name: Plugin Inner API URL
Config.Description: Inner API URL used by the plugin daemon. Leave blank for the AIO localhost API.

Config.Name: Verify Plugin Signatures
Config.Description: Require signed plugins where Dify supports signature verification.

Config.Name: Marketplace Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the Dify plugin marketplace integration.

Config.Name: Mail Type
Config.Description: Mail provider used by Dify.

Config.Name: Resend API Key
Config.Description: Resend API key when Mail Type is resend.

Config.Name: SMTP Server
Config.Description: SMTP host when Mail Type is smtp.

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port.

Config.Name: SMTP Username
Config.Description: SMTP username.

Config.Name: SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password.

Config.Name: Mail From
Config.Description: Default sender address for Dify email.

Config.Name: Nginx Port
Config.Description: Internal Nginx listen port. Keep this aligned with the Web UI Port mapping.

Config.Name: Nginx Server Name
Config.Description: Nginx server_name value.

Config.Name: Nginx Client Max Body Size
Config.Description: Maximum request body size accepted by the bundled Nginx gateway.

Config.Name: Nginx Proxy Read Timeout
Config.Description: Bundled Nginx proxy read timeout.

Config.Name: Nginx Proxy Send Timeout
Config.Description: Bundled Nginx proxy send timeout.

Config.Name: Website Firecrawl
Config.Description: Expose Firecrawl as a Dify website datasource option. Configure Firecrawl credentials inside Dify where required.

Config.Name: Website Jina Reader
Config.Description: Expose Jina Reader as a Dify website datasource option.

Config.Name: Website WaterCrawl
Config.Description: Expose WaterCrawl as a Dify website datasource option.

Config.Name: AIO Wait Timeout Seconds
Config.Description: Startup wait timeout for internal service readiness checks.

Config.Name: AIO Extra Env File
Config.Description: Optional dotenv-style file for rare upstream Dify variables that are intentionally not shown in the Unraid template.

Config.Name: AIO LANG Override
Config.Description: Optional locale override for LANG. Leave blank for C.UTF-8.

Config.Name: AIO LC_ALL Override
Config.Description: Optional locale override for LC_ALL. Leave blank for C.UTF-8.

Config.Name: Dify Web Port
Config.Description: Internal Dify web service port. Keep aligned with the bundled Nginx proxy.

Config.Name: Dify Web Host
Config.Description: Internal Dify web service bind host.

Config.Name: Plugin Platform
Config.Description: Plugin daemon platform mode. The AIO default is local.

Config.Name: Plugin Remote Installing Host
Config.Description: Plugin remote-install/debug host used by the plugin daemon.

Config.Name: Plugin Remote Installing Port
Config.Description: Plugin remote-install/debug port used by the plugin daemon.

Config.Name: Plugin Max Package Size
Config.Description: Maximum plugin package size accepted by the plugin daemon, in bytes.

Config.Name: Plugin Daemon Port
Config.Description: Internal plugin daemon port. Keep aligned with the bundled Nginx /e/ route.

Config.Name: Plugin DB SSL Mode
Config.Description: Plugin daemon database SSL mode.

Config.Name: Sandbox Pip Mirror URL
Config.Description: Optional Python package mirror URL used by the Dify sandbox.

Config.Name: Disable Next Telemetry
Config.Description: Disable telemetry from the bundled Next.js web runtime.

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: The log level for the application. Supported values are `DEBUG`, `INFO`, `WARNING`, `ERROR`, `CRITICAL`

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOG_OUTPUT_FORMAT
Config.Description: Log output format: text or json

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOG_FILE_MAX_SIZE
Config.Description: Log file max size, the unit is MB

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOG_FILE_BACKUP_COUNT
Config.Description: Log file max backup count

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOG_DATEFORMAT
Config.Description: Log dateformat

Config.Name: Dify Env: DEBUG
Config.Description: Debug mode, default is false. It is recommended to turn on this configuration for local development to prevent some problems caused by monkey patch.

Config.Name: Dify Env: FLASK_DEBUG
Config.Description: Flask debug mode, it can output trace information at the interface when turned on, which is convenient for debugging.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ENABLE_REQUEST_LOGGING
Config.Description: Enable request logging, which will log the request and response information. And the log level is DEBUG

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENAI_API_BASE
Config.Description: Used to change the OpenAI base address, default is https://api.openai.com/v1. When OpenAI cannot be accessed in China, replace it with a domestic mirror address, or when a local model provides OpenAI compatible API, it can be replaced.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MIGRATION_ENABLED
Config.Description: When enabled, migrations will be executed prior to application startup and the application will start after the migrations have completed.

Config.Name: Dify Env: FILES_ACCESS_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: File Access Time specifies a time interval in seconds for the file to be accessed. The default value is 300 seconds.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ENABLE_COLLABORATION_MODE
Config.Description: Collaboration mode toggle To open collaboration features, you also need to set SERVER_WORKER_CLASS=geventwebsocket.gunicorn.workers.GeventWebSocketWorker

Config.Name: Dify Env: ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES
Config.Description: Access token expiration time in minutes Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS
Config.Description: Refresh token expiration time in days Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: APP_DEFAULT_ACTIVE_REQUESTS
Config.Description: The default number of active requests for the application, where 0 means unlimited, should be a non-negative integer.

Config.Name: Dify Env: APP_MAX_ACTIVE_REQUESTS
Config.Description: The maximum number of active requests for the application, where 0 means unlimited, should be a non-negative integer.

Config.Name: Dify Env: APP_MAX_EXECUTION_TIME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_AUTO_SCALE
Config.Description: Flag indicating whether to enable autoscaling of Celery workers. Autoscaling is useful when tasks are CPU intensive and can be dynamically allocated and deallocated based on the workload. When autoscaling is enabled, the maximum and minimum number of workers can be specified....

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_MAX_WORKERS
Config.Description: The maximum number of Celery workers that can be autoscaled. This is optional and only used when autoscaling is enabled. Default is not set.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_MIN_WORKERS
Config.Description: The minimum number of Celery workers that can be autoscaled. This is optional and only used when autoscaling is enabled. Default is not set.

Config.Name: Dify Env: API_TOOL_DEFAULT_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: API Tool configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: API_TOOL_DEFAULT_READ_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_SINGLE_DOLLAR_LATEX
Config.Description: Enable inline LaTeX rendering with single dollar signs ($...$) in the web frontend Default is false for security reasons to prevent conflicts with regular text

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_POOL_SIZE
Config.Description: The size of the database connection pool. The default is 30 connections, which can be appropriately increased.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_MAX_OVERFLOW
Config.Description: The default is 10 connections, which allows temporary overflow beyond the pool size.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_POOL_RECYCLE
Config.Description: Database connection pool recycling time, the default is 3600 seconds.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_ECHO
Config.Description: Whether to print SQL, default is false.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_POOL_PRE_PING
Config.Description: If True, will test connections for liveness upon each checkout

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_POOL_USE_LIFO
Config.Description: Whether to enable the Last in first out option or use default FIFO queue if is false

Config.Name: Dify Env: SQLALCHEMY_POOL_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Number of seconds to wait for a connection from the pool before raising a timeout error. Default is 30

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_MAX_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Maximum number of connections to the database Default is 100 Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-connection.html#GUC-MAX-CONNECTIONS

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_SHARED_BUFFERS
Config.Description: Sets the amount of shared memory used for postgres's shared buffers. Default is 128MB Recommended value: 25% of available memory Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-resource.html#GUC-SHARED-BUFFERS

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_WORK_MEM
Config.Description: Sets the amount of memory used by each database worker for working space. Default is 4MB Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-resource.html#GUC-WORK-MEM

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_MAINTENANCE_WORK_MEM
Config.Description: Sets the amount of memory reserved for maintenance activities. Default is 64MB Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-resource.html#GUC-MAINTENANCE-WORK-MEM

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_EFFECTIVE_CACHE_SIZE
Config.Description: Sets the planner's assumption about the effective cache size. Default is 4096MB Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-query.html#GUC-EFFECTIVE-CACHE-SIZE

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_STATEMENT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Sets the maximum allowed duration of any statement before termination. Default is 0 (no timeout). Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-client.html#GUC-STATEMENT-TIMEOUT A value of 0 prevents the server from timing out statements.

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSTGRES_IDLE_IN_TRANSACTION_SESSION_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Sets the maximum allowed duration of any idle in-transaction session before termination. Default is 0 (no timeout). Reference: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/runtime-config-client.html#GUC-IDLE-IN-TRANSACTION-SESSION-TIMEOUT A value of 0 prevents the server from...

Config.Name: Dify Env: MYSQL_MAX_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: MySQL Performance Configuration Maximum number of connections to MySQL Default is 1000

Config.Name: Dify Env: MYSQL_INNODB_BUFFER_POOL_SIZE
Config.Description: InnoDB buffer pool size Default is 512M Recommended value: 70-80% of available memory for dedicated MySQL server Reference: https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/innodb-parameters.html#sysvar_innodb_buffer_pool_size

Config.Name: Dify Env: MYSQL_INNODB_LOG_FILE_SIZE
Config.Description: InnoDB log file size Default is 128M Reference: https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/innodb-parameters.html#sysvar_innodb_log_file_size

Config.Name: Dify Env: MYSQL_INNODB_FLUSH_LOG_AT_TRX_COMMIT
Config.Description: InnoDB flush log at transaction commit Default is 2 (flush to OS cache, sync every second) Options: 0 (no flush), 1 (flush and sync), 2 (flush to OS cache) Reference: https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/innodb-parameters.html#sysvar_innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_USERNAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_USE_SSL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SSL_CERT_REQS
Config.Description: SSL configuration for Redis (when REDIS_USE_SSL=true)

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SSL_CA_CERTS
Config.Description: Options: CERT_NONE, CERT_OPTIONAL, CERT_REQUIRED

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SSL_CERTFILE
Config.Description: Path to CA certificate file for SSL verification

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SSL_KEYFILE
Config.Description: Path to client certificate file for SSL authentication

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_DB
Config.Description: Path to client private key file for SSL authentication

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_KEY_PREFIX
Config.Description: Optional global prefix for Redis keys, topics, streams, and Celery Redis transport artifacts. Leave empty to preserve current unprefixed behavior.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_MAX_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Optional: limit total Redis connections used by API/Worker (unset for default) Align with API's REDIS_MAX_CONNECTIONS in configs

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_USE_SENTINEL
Config.Description: Whether to use Redis Sentinel mode. If set to true, the application will automatically discover and connect to the master node through Sentinel.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SENTINELS
Config.Description: List of Redis Sentinel nodes. If Sentinel mode is enabled, provide at least one Sentinel IP and port. Format: `<sentinel1_ip>:<sentinel1_port>,<sentinel2_ip>:<sentinel2_port>,<sentinel3_ip>:<sentinel3_port>`

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SENTINEL_SERVICE_NAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SENTINEL_USERNAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SENTINEL_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SENTINEL_SOCKET_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_USE_CLUSTERS
Config.Description: List of Redis Cluster nodes. If Cluster mode is enabled, provide at least one Cluster IP and port. Format: `<Cluster1_ip>:<Cluster1_port>,<Cluster2_ip>:<Cluster2_port>,<Cluster3_ip>:<Cluster3_port>`

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_CLUSTERS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_CLUSTERS_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_RETRY_RETRIES
Config.Description: Redis connection and retry configuration max redis retry

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_RETRY_BACKOFF_BASE
Config.Description: Base delay (in seconds) for exponential backoff on retries

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_RETRY_BACKOFF_CAP
Config.Description: Cap (in seconds) for exponential backoff on retries

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SOCKET_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Timeout (in seconds) for Redis socket operations

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_SOCKET_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Timeout (in seconds) for establishing a Redis connection

Config.Name: Dify Env: REDIS_HEALTH_CHECK_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Interval (in seconds) for Redis health checks

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_BACKEND
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_USE_SENTINEL
Config.Description: If you are using Redis Sentinel for high availability, configure the following settings.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_SENTINEL_MASTER_NAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_SENTINEL_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_SENTINEL_SOCKET_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CELERY_TASK_ANNOTATIONS
Config.Description: e.g. {"tasks.add": {"rate_limit": "10/s"}}

Config.Name: Dify Env: WEB_API_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Specifies the allowed origins for cross-origin requests to the Web API, e.g. https://dify.app or * for all origins.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CONSOLE_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
Config.Description: Specifies the allowed origins for cross-origin requests to the console API, e.g. https://cloud.dify.ai or * for all origins.

Config.Name: Dify Env: COOKIE_DOMAIN
Config.Description: When the frontend and backend run on different subdomains, set COOKIE_DOMAIN to the site's top-level domain (e.g., `example.com`). Leading dots are optional.

Config.Name: Dify Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_COOKIE_DOMAIN
Config.Description: When the frontend and backend run on different subdomains, set NEXT_PUBLIC_COOKIE_DOMAIN=1.

Config.Name: Dify Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_BATCH_CONCURRENCY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: S3_ADDRESS_STYLE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: S3_USE_AWS_MANAGED_IAM
Config.Description: Whether to use AWS managed IAM roles for authenticating with the S3 service. If set to false, the access key and secret key must be provided.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_ENABLED
Config.Description: Workflow run and Conversation archive storage (S3-compatible)

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_ARCHIVE_BUCKET
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_EXPORT_BUCKET
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ARCHIVE_STORAGE_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: AZURE_BLOB_ACCOUNT_NAME
Config.Description: Azure Blob Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: AZURE_BLOB_ACCOUNT_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: AZURE_BLOB_CONTAINER_NAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: AZURE_BLOB_ACCOUNT_URL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: GOOGLE_STORAGE_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Google Storage Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: GOOGLE_STORAGE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON_BASE64
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: The Alibaba Cloud OSS configurations,

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_AUTH_VERSION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ALIYUN_OSS_PATH
Config.Description: Don't start with '/'. OSS doesn't support leading slash in object names.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Tencent COS Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_SECRET_ID
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_SCHEME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TENCENT_COS_CUSTOM_DOMAIN
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HUAWEI_OBS_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Huawei OBS Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: HUAWEI_OBS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HUAWEI_OBS_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HUAWEI_OBS_SERVER
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HUAWEI_OBS_PATH_STYLE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: VOLCENGINE_TOS_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Volcengine TOS Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: VOLCENGINE_TOS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: VOLCENGINE_TOS_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: VOLCENGINE_TOS_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: VOLCENGINE_TOS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SUPABASE_BUCKET_NAME
Config.Description: Supabase Storage Configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: SUPABASE_API_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SUPABASE_URL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: VECTOR_INDEX_NAME_PREFIX
Config.Description: Prefix used to create collection name in vector database

Config.Name: Dify Env: WEAVIATE_TOKENIZATION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: QDRANT_CLIENT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: QDRANT_GRPC_ENABLED
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: QDRANT_GRPC_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: QDRANT_REPLICATION_FACTOR
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_URI
Config.Description: Milvus configuration. Only available when VECTOR_STORE is `milvus`. The milvus uri.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_DATABASE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_TOKEN
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_USER
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_ENABLE_HYBRID_SEARCH
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_ANALYZER_PARAMS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PGVECTOR_MIN_CONNECTION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PGVECTOR_MAX_CONNECTION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PGVECTOR_PG_BIGM
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PGVECTOR_PG_BIGM_VERSION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_VECTOR_HOST
Config.Description: TiDB vector configurations, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `tidb_vector`

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_VECTOR_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_VECTOR_USER
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_VECTOR_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_VECTOR_DATABASE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_ON_QDRANT_URL
Config.Description: Tidb on qdrant configuration, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `tidb_on_qdrant`

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_ON_QDRANT_API_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_ON_QDRANT_CLIENT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_ON_QDRANT_GRPC_ENABLED
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: TIDB_ON_QDRANT_GRPC_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_HOST
Config.Description: Chroma configuration, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `chroma`

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_TENANT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_DATABASE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_AUTH_PROVIDER
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CHROMA_AUTH_CREDENTIALS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_HOST
Config.Description: open search configuration, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `opensearch`

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_SECURE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_VERIFY_CERTS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_AUTH_METHOD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_USER
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_AWS_REGION
Config.Description: If using AWS managed IAM, e.g. Managed Cluster or OpenSearch Serverless

Config.Name: Dify Env: OPENSEARCH_AWS_SERVICE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_HOST
Config.Description: ElasticSearch configuration, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `elasticsearch`

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_PORT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_USE_CLOUD
Config.Description: Using ElasticSearch Cloud Serverless, or not.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_CLOUD_URL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_API_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_VERIFY_CERTS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_CA_CERTS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_RETRY_ON_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ELASTICSEARCH_MAX_RETRIES
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPSTASH_VECTOR_URL
Config.Description: Upstash Vector configuration, only available when VECTOR_STORE is `upstash`

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPSTASH_VECTOR_TOKEN
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable. Upstream ships a sample value; the AIO template intentionally leaves it blank.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Upload file size limit, default 15M.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_FILE_BATCH_LIMIT
Config.Description: The maximum number of files that can be uploaded at a time, default 5.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_FILE_EXTENSION_BLACKLIST
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of file extensions blocked from upload for security reasons. Extensions should be lowercase without dots (e.g., exe,bat,sh,dll). Empty by default to allow all file types. Recommended: exe,bat,cmd,com,scr,vbs,ps1,msi,dll

Config.Name: Dify Env: ATTACHMENT_IMAGE_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Maximum allowed image file size for attachments in megabytes, default 2.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ATTACHMENT_IMAGE_DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Timeout for downloading image attachments in seconds, default 60.

Config.Name: Dify Env: ETL_TYPE
Config.Description: ETL type, support: `dify`, `Unstructured` `dify` Dify's proprietary file extraction scheme `Unstructured` Unstructured.io file extraction scheme

Config.Name: Dify Env: UNSTRUCTURED_API_URL
Config.Description: Unstructured API path and API key, needs to be configured when ETL_TYPE is Unstructured Or using Unstructured for document extractor node for pptx. For example: http://unstructured:8000/general/v0/general

Config.Name: Dify Env: UNSTRUCTURED_API_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: MULTIMODAL_SEND_FORMAT
Config.Description: The format of the image/video/audio/document sent when the multi-modal model is input, the default is base64, optional url. The delay of the call in url mode will be lower than that in base64 mode. It is generally recommended to use the more compatible base64 mode. If...

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_IMAGE_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Upload image file size limit, default 10M.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_VIDEO_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Upload video file size limit, default 100M.

Config.Name: Dify Env: UPLOAD_AUDIO_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT
Config.Description: Upload audio file size limit, default 50M.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SENTRY_DSN
Config.Description: Sentry Configuration Used for application monitoring and error log tracking.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_SENTRY_ENABLED
Config.Description: Plugin_daemon Service Sentry DSN address, default is empty, when empty, all monitoring information is not reported to Sentry. If not set, Sentry error reporting will be disabled.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_SENTRY_DSN
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: NOTION_INTEGRATION_TYPE
Config.Description: Configure as "public" or "internal". Since Notion's OAuth redirect URL only supports HTTPS, if deploying locally, please use Notion's internal integration.

Config.Name: Dify Env: NOTION_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Notion OAuth client secret (used for public integration type)

Config.Name: Dify Env: NOTION_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Notion OAuth client id (used for public integration type)

Config.Name: Dify Env: NOTION_INTERNAL_SECRET
Config.Description: Notion internal integration secret. If the value of NOTION_INTEGRATION_TYPE is "internal", you need to configure this variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: RESEND_API_URL
Config.Description: API-Key for the Resend email provider, used when MAIL_TYPE is `resend`.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SMTP_USE_TLS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SMTP_OPPORTUNISTIC_TLS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SMTP_LOCAL_HOSTNAME
Config.Description: Optional: override the local hostname used for SMTP HELO/EHLO

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_SSL_VERIFY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_POOL_MAX_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_POOL_MAX_KEEPALIVE_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_POOL_KEEPALIVE_EXPIRY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_READ_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: CODE_EXECUTION_WRITE_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOGSTORE_DUAL_WRITE_ENABLED
Config.Description: Enable dual-write to both SLS LogStore and SQL database (default: false)

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOGSTORE_DUAL_READ_ENABLED
Config.Description: Enable dual-read fallback to SQL database when LogStore returns no results (default: true) Useful for migration scenarios where historical data exists only in SQL database

Config.Name: Dify Env: LOGSTORE_ENABLE_PUT_GRAPH_FIELD
Config.Description: Control flag for whether to write the `graph` field to LogStore. If LOGSTORE_ENABLE_PUT_GRAPH_FIELD is "true", write the full `graph` field; otherwise write an empty {} instead. Defaults to writing the `graph` field.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HTTP_REQUEST_NODE_MAX_BINARY_SIZE
Config.Description: HTTP request node in workflow configuration

Config.Name: Dify Env: HTTP_REQUEST_NODE_MAX_TEXT_SIZE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: HTTP_REQUEST_NODE_SSL_VERIFY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SANDBOX_GIN_MODE
Config.Description: The mode in which the Gin framework runs

Config.Name: Dify Env: MILVUS_AUTHORIZATION_ENABLED
Config.Description: Enable or disable security authorization

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_HTTP_PORT
Config.Description: Environment Variables for SSRF Proxy

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_DEFAULT_TIME_OUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_DEFAULT_CONNECT_TIME_OUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_DEFAULT_READ_TIME_OUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_DEFAULT_WRITE_TIME_OUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_POOL_MAX_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_POOL_MAX_KEEPALIVE_CONNECTIONS
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: SSRF_POOL_KEEPALIVE_EXPIRY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_TOOL_PINS
Config.Description: Pin, include, and exclude tools Use comma-separated values with no spaces between items. Example: POSITION_TOOL_PINS=bing,google

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_TOOL_INCLUDES
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_TOOL_EXCLUDES
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_PROVIDER_PINS
Config.Description: Pin, include, and exclude model providers Use comma-separated values with no spaces between items. Example: POSITION_PROVIDER_PINS=openai,openllm

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_PROVIDER_INCLUDES
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: POSITION_PROVIDER_EXCLUDES
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_STORAGE_TYPE
Config.Description: https://github.com/langgenius/dify-plugin-daemon/blob/main/.env.example Plugin storage type, local aws_s3 tencent_cos azure_blob aliyun_oss volcengine_tos

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_STORAGE_OSS_BUCKET
Config.Description: Plugin oss bucket

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_S3_USE_AWS
Config.Description: Plugin oss s3 credentials

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_S3_USE_AWS_MANAGED_IAM
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_S3_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_S3_USE_PATH_STYLE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_AWS_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_AWS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_AWS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME
Config.Description: Plugin oss azure blob

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_TENCENT_COS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Plugin oss tencent cos

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_TENCENT_COS_SECRET_ID
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_TENCENT_COS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_REGION
Config.Description: Plugin oss aliyun oss

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_AUTH_VERSION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_ALIYUN_OSS_PATH
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_VOLCENGINE_TOS_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: Plugin oss volcengine tos

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_VOLCENGINE_TOS_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_VOLCENGINE_TOS_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: PLUGIN_VOLCENGINE_TOS_REGION
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_EXPORTER_TYPE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_SAMPLING_RATE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_BATCH_EXPORT_SCHEDULE_DELAY
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_MAX_QUEUE_SIZE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_MAX_EXPORT_BATCH_SIZE
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_METRIC_EXPORT_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_BATCH_EXPORT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.

Config.Name: Dify Env: OTEL_METRIC_EXPORT_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Upstream Dify self-hosted environment variable.
